productDisplayName: Nike Men Club Pique Polo Blue T-shirt
description: Composition Blue polo T-shirt for men made of 100% cotton, has a spread, ribbed collar, half buttoned placket, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs and embroidered nike swoosh on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not dry clean or bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Designed to offer exemplary comfort, this polo T-shirt from nike is crafted from a soft fabric in a perfect blend of colours to add a sporty edge to your style. Team it with jeans and sports shoes.
